How's it going everybody? In this video we're going to cover a very important topic, which is your release form. You need a signed release form for all members, challengers, and employees. Now this release is for them to provide permission to use pictures, videos, recordings of them, or their testimonials on social media, marketing, and other places. You want to include your release as part of all new signups. And also get your existing members to sign one as well. And you want to audit regularly to confirm you have a signed release for everyone on file. You want to make sure you're maintaining those, just in case you have somebody who's no longer a part of your gym, but you're still using their testimonial or picture later on. As long as you have that release on file, that's going to make sure that you're able to use. Now we've provided an example release form template. It's going to be linked below this video. You click on it, make a copy, and it's going to be saved in your Google Drive to use. The template we provide is an example for us businesses should not be considered legal advice, but as part of best practices based on our experience. We just claim any liability that may arise. And as always, we recommend consulting with your own legal counsel to verify that the content meets the needs for your unique business. I hope you enjoyed this video. It is very important that you get that release form for everybody. If you have any questions, reach out to us. But remember, you want to reach out to your own legal counsel for anything related to those legal needs. We can provide advice on that. Hope you have a great rest of your day.
